text: Audited a high-cost AWS environment to find teardown and optimization targets, then executed a careful decommission of the unused "aftershoot" application, monitored live via a botbeam dashboard (using the botbeam skill from the orchestra repo) that beamed task status as the plan ran. Deliberately preserved the aftershoot database and packaged an export of its prompt runs for Adam, formatted so he could browse the runs as if viewing them on the original website. Set up orchestratorstudios.ai alongside the existing .com: issued an ACM certificate, added four DNS records, and updated the CloudFront distribution so the site resolves on .ai with and without www, verifying all four hostnames end-to-end. Ended with the user authorizing one more careful cleanup.
